title: pyrus elliptica
intro: Pyrus elliptica, also known as the Chinese pear, is a species of pear tree native to China. This deciduous tree is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which has been used to treat various ailments. The bark of Pyrus elliptica contains salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin, which provides anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects, helping to alleviate conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Pyrus elliptica bark can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, offering potential health benefits including pain relief, reduced inflammation, and improved cardiovascular health.
